notes: Eval 3 (403 error): without-skill response contains incorrect factual claim — says role changes take effect immediately, contradicting the 3-5 min cache wait the skill correctly specifies
Eval 4 (list): without-skill passes 'does not deploy' assertion coincidentally — it's paralyzed, not making an intentional correct decision
With-skill runs are 100% pass rate across all 5 evals — the skill provides clear, unambiguous guidance for every scenario
Eval 5 (missing .env): without-skill scores 75% — general D365 knowledge partially covers this scenario, but misses the project-specific .env.example shortcut
Evals 1 and 2 show the starkest contrast: without-skill scores 0% because it has no knowledge of deploy.py, uv, or the prefix path convention
